name: cypress-real-dnd
description: Real HTML5 drag-and-drop for Cypress via Chrome DevTools Protocol. The first Cypress plugin that actually triggers react-dnd, Sortable.js, dnd-kit's html5 sensor, and plain HTML5 draggables — where cypress-drag-drop's synthetic events and cypress-real-events' mouse events do not.

scripts.test: echo 'See examples/ for a working react-dnd self-test'
